## Discussion

Determines if the AttributeSetNotification notification or the ProcessData blocks are deferred until [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformExecute(_:_:)] is called. This metadata value has a default value of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] for the input attribute but is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] for all other attributes.

# SecTransformMetaAttributeType.deferred

**Case**

The attribute defers notifications.

## Declaration

```swift
case deferred
```

## Discussion

Determines if the AttributeSetNotification notification or the ProcessData blocks are deferred until [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformExecute(_:_:)] is called. This metadata value has a default value of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] for the input attribute but is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] for all other attributes.
title: SecTransformMetaAttributeType.deferred
